title: Chapter 301
content:
Chapter 301: Chapter 301 : Suffering Is A Universal Language

Jax continued with his cold face and flat tone. "I have just changed the person who was supposed to be on the receiving end. The same end where my student Elira would have been. The difference is your mother has to obey and surrender her body for just a single day. While Elira would have gone through it until she decided to take her own life."

He stepped closer to Delphine.

"Where were those sins and that justice at that time? Why didn’t your justice-seeking ass intervene back then?"

She went silent.

But Jax wasn’t. "Where were your tears then? Where were your grand speeches about sin, morality, and justice when it was my student staring into hell? Why did your righteous conscience stay so perfectly asleep until the suffering finally knocked on your own front door?"

She was grinding her teeth while staring at the ground. Jax raised her head using the flat of his sword beneath her chin until their eyes met again.

"Nothing to say?" He mocked gently. "Good. Hold onto that silence. Because the truth you are choking on right now is the fundamental law of this universe. Every act of unpunished cruelty is a debt borrowed against the future. Your mother spent her entire life writing checks with the blood and tears of others, genuinely believing she sat too high up for the collector to ever reach her."

His voice didn’t rise. Didn’t need to. "But she made the most foolish mistake by knocking on the door of the cruelest collector."

He said with that same flat tone. "I know you will attend my class soon. But luck has made you witness my lesson way before the others. I am here to teach you that the universe does not bend to your mother’s entitlement. Suffering is a universal language. And today, your family is going to learn how to speak it fluently."

He turned back toward Sianna and started walking, sword still in his hand. When he reached her, the tip of his blade caught the loose strip of fabric covering her pussy and dragged it along as he walked past. The fabric met the sharp edge and in moments it split on its own, revealing the glistening pussy beneath.

"Delphine. Go back to the camp this instant. This is the price I have to pay for taking things lightly and getting fooled by this scoundrel."

She added. "But rest assured. Soon I will be bathing in his blood."

Jax grabbed her neck from behind and said. "You still don’t get it, do you? You still don’t know where you went wrong. What sins you committed that landed you here."

He sat down on the grass and fallen petals, giving a slow rub across her pussy with his palm before settling. "But it’s fine. Our lovely session will teach you something for sure."

"Ride it. Show me how much of a bitch you are."

Delphine turned. Stopped at her shoulder. "Even if he by any chance survives this, I will make sure he won’t be able to hide in the academy. I will make sure I have the final laugh for what he has done."

And saying so she walked away with rage burning in every step.
